description: Eval spec for /review-agentskills-spec — audits agentskills.io spec drift vs clauditor's enforcement

grading_criteria.criterion: Did the skill successfully fetch and read the agentskills.io specification (not just guess at its contents)?
Does the output include a coverage inventory mapping spec rules to clauditor's current behavior, classifying each as matches/missing/drifted?
Are the identified gaps or drift items specific and actionable (not vague or generic)?
